description: Session 07b Tier-0: PR #1089 family port — Turbo-Muon (Polar Express + AOL, 4 steps), EngramLite (multi-head multi-order hash), ASQU v3 per-layer slopes, sigmoid-gated U-Net skips, mimetic V-O init, qk_gain=4.0, warmdown=2000, lr_floor=0.05, embed/head beta1=0.7. Uniform int6 + brotli-10 export. No GPTQ, no TTT.
delta: Port core PR #1089 innovations onto 06b banking/Muon/brotli chassis
